name: HELLO LARSONS COFFEE ROASTERY & DRIVE THRU

violations.description: Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. Boxes of cups/lids etc. stored on floor. Store a minimum of 6" off floor. Straws etc. stored in cabinet under hand sink that has leaky drain line.
Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. Leaking drain line from hand sink. Repair tech called.

Storage areas for refuse, recyclables, and returnables. — --The outside storage surface for holding refuse, recyclables and returnables was not constructed of nonabsorbent material and/or sloped to drain. Dumpsters stored on gravel lot.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. Mixing spoons and scoops stored in container of tepid water. Repair and us running water dipper well.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. Boxes of single service cups & lids stored on floor. Store a minimum of 6 inches off floor. Paper towels stored under hand sink. Store away from unprotected drain lines.
Clean dry location, protected (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
